theme.en: AI Scarcity Reprices the Chip Stack
theme.zh: AI稀缺性重估芯片供应链

dek.en: Tight advanced-node capacity is pushing foundry prices higher while memory suppliers plan long-cycle expansion. Export controls and China-specific product strategies are also reshaping where that capacity can be sold.
dek.zh: 先进制程产能趋紧，推动晶圆代工价格上行，存储厂商则启动跨周期扩产。与此同时，出口管制与面向中国市场的产品策略正在重塑这些产能的销售去向。

title.en: AI & Accelerators
title.zh: AI与加速器

title.en: Nvidia Offers Vera CPUs to Chinese Customers as GPU Sales Remain Frozen
title.zh: GPU销售仍受阻，Nvidia向中国客户推介Vera CPU

summary.en: Nvidia has told Chinese customers that its Arm-based Vera server CPU could be available as early as August, while sales of its H200 GPU remain frozen. A CPU-led entry would give Nvidia a product path into Chinese AI infrastructure without resolving the larger accelerator restriction, and it tests whether customers will adopt Vera independently of the full rack platform.
summary.zh: Nvidia已告知中国客户，其基于Arm的Vera服务器CPU最快可于8月供应，而H200 GPU销售仍处于冻结状态。以CPU切入可为Nvidia重返中国AI基础设施市场提供一条产品路径，但并未解决加速器受限的问题，也将检验客户是否愿意脱离完整机架平台单独采用Vera。

title.en: AWS Reportedly Weighs Qualcomm AI200 for Lower-Cost Inference
title.zh: 报道称AWS考虑采用Qualcomm AI200降低推理成本

summary.en: AWS could deepen its work with Qualcomm around the AI200 accelerator, which is described as offering 768GB of memory, according to a Wells Fargo report cited by Wccftech. The idea is aimed at reducing inference hardware costs and improving cloud margins, but it remains analyst reporting rather than a customer announcement or confirmed deployment.
summary.zh: 据Wccftech援引Wells Fargo报告，AWS可能围绕配备768GB内存的Qualcomm AI200加速器深化合作。其目标是降低推理硬件成本并改善云业务利润率，但目前仍属于分析师报告，并非客户公告或已确认的部署。

title.en: Foundry & Manufacturing
title.zh: 晶圆代工与制造

title.en: TSMC Reportedly Considers a 15% Price Increase for 3nm
title.zh: 报道称台积电考虑将3nm价格上调15%

summary.en: TSMC is reportedly considering a 15% increase in 3nm wafer pricing as AI demand tightens leading-edge capacity. If implemented, the increase would pass scarcity costs to accelerator and premium-compute customers and reinforce TSMC's pricing power, though the candidate report does not establish a final customer notice or effective date.
summary.zh: 报道称，随着AI需求压紧先进制程产能，台积电正考虑将3nm晶圆价格上调15%。若落地，稀缺成本将进一步传导至加速器和高端计算客户，并强化台积电的定价权；但候选报道尚未确认正式客户通知或生效日期。

title.en: Top-Ten Foundry Revenue Rises 3.7% in the First Quarter
title.zh: 第一季度全球前十大晶圆代工厂营收增长3.7%

summary.en: Revenue at the world's ten largest foundries rose 3.7% in the first quarter as AI demand offset softer smartphone conditions, according to TrendForce data cited by Wccftech. Utilization improved at some previously underused nodes, and a further second-quarter tightening could support broader wafer-price increases later in 2026.
summary.zh: 据Wccftech援引TrendForce数据，AI需求抵消了智能手机市场的疲软，全球前十大晶圆代工厂第一季度营收增长3.7%。部分此前利用率偏低的制程已出现改善，若第二季度继续收紧，2026年后续晶圆价格可能获得更广泛的上行动力。

title.en: Samsung Foundry Reportedly Pursues Google AI-Chip Production
title.zh: 报道称Samsung Foundry争取Google AI芯片代工订单

summary.en: Samsung Foundry is reportedly seeking a production agreement for a Google AI chip. A confirmed design win would give Samsung a strategically important hyperscaler customer and strengthen its challenge to TSMC in advanced logic, but the candidate item describes negotiations rather than a signed manufacturing award.
summary.zh: 报道称，Samsung Foundry正在争取Google AI芯片的生产协议。若确认获得设计订单，Samsung将新增一个具有战略意义的超大规模云客户，并增强其在先进逻辑制程上挑战台积电的能力；但候选报道描述的是洽谈，而非已签署的制造合同。

title.en: Memory
title.zh: 存储

title.en: SK Hynix Targets a Threefold Increase in Memory Wafer Capacity by 2034
title.zh: SK hynix计划到2034年将存储晶圆产能提高至三倍

summary.en: SK Hynix plans to triple memory wafer capacity by 2034 as AI systems drive sustained demand for DRAM and HBM. The eight-year horizon shows how slowly cleanrooms, equipment, and process ramps translate into usable supply, so near-term HBM constraints will not disappear simply because long-range capacity targets are rising.
summary.zh: SK hynix计划到2034年将存储晶圆产能提高至目前的三倍，以应对AI系统对DRAM和HBM的持续需求。长达八年的建设周期说明，洁净室、设备导入和制程爬坡转化为有效供给需要很长时间，因此长期扩产目标上调并不意味着近期HBM瓶颈会迅速消失。

title.en: SK Hynix Reportedly Plans a $14 Billion Nasdaq Listing
title.zh: 报道称SK hynix计划推进140亿美元Nasdaq上市

summary.en: SK Hynix is reportedly pursuing a Nasdaq listing tied to a $14 billion AI-driven capital push. A US listing could broaden the memory maker's investor base and provide another financing channel for expensive HBM capacity, although the candidate item does not specify the security structure, timing, or final regulatory status.
summary.zh: 报道称，SK hynix正推进Nasdaq上市，并与一项140亿美元的AI相关资本计划相联系。美国上市可扩大其投资者基础，并为高成本HBM扩产提供新的融资渠道；但候选信息未说明证券结构、时间安排或最终监管状态。

title.en: Policy & Geopolitics
title.zh: 政策与地缘政治

title.en: China's Indium Phosphide Export Controls Pressure AI Supply Chains
title.zh: 中国磷化铟出口管制挤压AI供应链

summary.en: Chinese export controls on indium phosphide are tightening supply for AI-related photonics and communications components, according to the candidate report. The material sits upstream of high-speed optical links and compound-semiconductor devices, so constrained availability can affect data-center interconnect deployment even when logic-chip supply is adequate.
summary.zh: 据候选报道，中国对磷化铟实施的出口管制正在收紧AI相关光子与通信器件的供应。该材料位于高速光互连和化合物半导体器件的上游，因此即使逻辑芯片供应充足，材料短缺仍可能影响数据中心互连部署。

title.en: US Lawmakers Seek CHIPS Funding Eligibility for Space Manufacturing
title.zh: 美国议员推动太空制造项目获得CHIPS资金资格

summary.en: US lawmakers are seeking to make space-based manufacturers eligible for CHIPS program funding. The proposal would extend semiconductor industrial policy beyond terrestrial fabs into orbital manufacturing, but it is a legislative initiative rather than an awarded subsidy and still faces questions about technical readiness and program scope.
summary.zh: 美国议员正推动将太空制造企业纳入CHIPS计划的资金支持范围。该提案将半导体产业政策从地面晶圆厂延伸至轨道制造，但目前仍是立法倡议而非已授予的补贴，其技术成熟度和计划边界仍待明确。

title.en: Earnings & Markets
title.zh: 业绩与市场

title.en: TSMC's May Sales Rise 30% as Export-Policy Risk Weighs on Shares
title.zh: 台积电5月销售额增长30%，出口政策风险压制股价

summary.en: TSMC reported 30% year-over-year sales growth in May, extending the revenue benefit from AI and advanced-node demand. The shares nevertheless remained under pressure as Taiwan considered tighter restrictions on AI-chip exports to China, showing that policy risk can offset strong operating momentum in market pricing.
summary.zh: 台积电5月销售额同比增长30%，继续受益于AI和先进制程需求。尽管经营动能强劲，其股价仍因台湾考虑收紧对中国的AI芯片出口限制而承压，显示政策风险足以抵消基本面利好在市场定价中的影响。

theme.en: Efficiency Moves Into Control and Scheduling
theme.zh: 效率优化进入控制与调度层

dek.en: This week's hardware-relevant papers attack overhead above the arithmetic units: protocol duplication, excess reasoning tokens, static GPU groups, and inflexible neuron datapaths. Device work adds measured views of CdTe field dynamics and micron-scale magnonic non-reciprocity.
dek.zh: 本周与硬件密切相关的论文把优化重点放在算术单元之上，包括协议重复、冗余推理token、静态GPU分组和不灵活的神经元数据通路。器件研究则带来CdTe电场动态和微米级磁振子非互易性的实测结果。

title.en: Devices & Process
title.zh: 器件与工艺

title.en: Electric-Field Mapping of Optically Perturbed CdTe Radiation Detectors
title.zh: 光扰动CdTe辐射探测器的电场映射

papers.authors: A. Cola, L. Dominici, A. Valletta

summary.en: The paper maps the two-dimensional electric-field vector and its time evolution inside a Schottky CdTe detector after localized optical exposure, using the Pockels effect and custom image processing. The measured dynamics agree with simulations based on a dominant two-level deep-trap model, giving a compact explanation for space-charge-driven field distortion. This is a device-level diagnostic result rather than a manufacturing demonstration, but it could improve failure analysis and operating models for CdTe radiation sensors.
summary.zh: 论文利用Pockels效应和定制图像处理，在局部光照后测量Schottky CdTe探测器内部二维电场矢量及其时间演化。实测动态与基于主导双能级深陷阱模型的仿真一致，为空间电荷引起的电场畸变提供了简洁解释。该工作属于器件级诊断，而非制造验证，但可改进CdTe辐射传感器的失效分析和工作模型。

title.en: A Micron-Scale Three-Port Magnonic Circulator
title.zh: 微米级三端口磁振子环行器

papers.authors: K. S. Weber, L. Temdie, V. Castel, et al.

summary.en: The authors experimentally demonstrate spin-wave circulation across all three ports of a micron-scale rectilinear magnonic device. Chiral excitation from nanowire gratings produces directional channels, while the operating band can be tuned from 2 to 8GHz with fields up to 100mT and grating geometry. The result is a prototype with a narrow operating band, but it provides measured evidence for integrated non-reciprocal microwave components at dimensions far below conventional circulators.
summary.zh: 作者在微米级直线型磁振子器件上，通过完整三端口谱学实验验证了端口之间的自旋波环行。纳米线光栅的手性激发形成定向通道，工作频段可借助最高100mT外磁场和光栅几何在2至8GHz范围内调节。该原型的工作带宽仍较窄，但为尺寸远小于传统环行器的集成非互易微波器件提供了实验证据。

title.en: AI Accelerators & Compute-in-Memory
title.zh: AI加速器与存算一体

title.en: ReSCom: A Reconfigurable Stochastic-Computing SNN Accelerator
title.zh: ReSCom：基于随机计算的可重构SNN加速器

papers.authors: A. A. Fereidani, M. R. Roshanshah, S. Safari

summary.en: ReSCom uses stochastic multiplication for neuron dynamics while retaining exact fixed-point addition and subtraction, allowing runtime trade-offs among accuracy, latency, and energy. One unified datapath supports integrate-and-fire, leaky integrate-and-fire, and synaptic neuron models; an Artix-7 FPGA implementation reaches 92.80% MNIST accuracy. The result is useful architectural evidence, but it is an FPGA study on a small benchmark rather than measured ASIC silicon or a modern large-scale SNN workload.
summary.zh: ReSCom在神经元动态中采用随机乘法，同时保留精确的定点加减法，从而可在运行时权衡精度、延迟与能耗。统一数据通路支持IF、LIF和Synaptic三类神经元模型，在Artix-7 FPGA上实现92.80%的MNIST准确率。该结果具有架构参考价值，但仍是小型基准上的FPGA研究，并非ASIC实测硅片或现代大规模SNN负载。

title.en: Optical Equilibrium Propagation on a Spatial Photonic Ising Machine
title.zh: 空间光子Ising机上的光学平衡传播

papers.authors: D. Vanden Abeele, D. Veraldi, D. Pierangeli, et al.

summary.en: The work demonstrates a hybrid optical-digital implementation of equilibrium propagation using a spatial photonic Ising machine. A spatial light modulator encodes continuous neuron states and rank-1 binary trainable patterns as optical phase, with an experimental evaluation on the Wine dataset and numerical scaling work on MNIST. It is a concrete physical implementation, but the larger-task evidence remains simulated and the setup is not yet an integrated photonic accelerator.
summary.zh: 该工作利用空间光子Ising机实现了混合光电平衡传播。空间光调制器把连续神经元状态和秩1二值可训练模式编码为光学相位，实验部分使用Wine数据集，向MNIST扩展的结果则来自数值研究。它给出了具体的物理实现，但更大任务的证据仍停留在仿真阶段，系统也尚未成为集成光子加速器。

title.en: AI Research for Systems & Hardware
title.zh: 面向系统与硬件的AI研究

title.en: Early Exit at the Commitment Boundary Cuts Reasoning Length
title.zh: 在承诺边界提前退出可缩短推理链

papers.authors: D. Scalena, S. Candussio, L. Bortolussi, et al.

summary.en: The paper identifies a commitment boundary where a reasoning model's answer becomes stable, after which many chain-of-thought steps no longer change the answer probability. Attention-based probes predict this transition across unseen tasks, enabling early exit that reduces reasoning length by up to 55% on average with negligible performance loss. The systems payoff is direct in lower token generation and accelerator occupancy, though the approach still depends on probe reliability across model families and deployment distributions.
summary.zh: 论文识别出一个「承诺边界」：推理模型的答案在此处趋于稳定，之后大量思维链步骤不再改变答案概率。基于注意力的探针可在未见任务上预测这一转折点，使平均推理长度最多降低55%，同时性能损失可忽略。其系统收益是直接减少token生成量和加速器占用，但实际部署仍取决于探针在不同模型家族和数据分布上的可靠性。

title.en: GF-DiT Dynamically Reschedules GPU Parallelism for Diffusion Serving
title.zh: GF-DiT为扩散模型服务动态重调度GPU并行度

papers.authors: X. Qiang, Y. Hu, S. Sun, et al.

summary.en: GF-DiT treats GPU parallelism as a schedulable resource instead of fixing one configuration for an entire diffusion-transformer request. Its runtime splits requests into independently schedulable trajectory tasks and uses group-free collectives to re-form execution groups online; the implementation is built in vLLM-Omni. The architecture targets utilization and service-quality losses caused by heterogeneous requests, but the candidate abstract is truncated before quantitative evaluation results, so the magnitude of the gain cannot be assessed here.
summary.zh: GF-DiT不再为整个Diffusion Transformer请求固定一种并行配置，而是把GPU并行度视为可调度资源。其运行时将请求拆分为可独立调度的轨迹任务，并通过无固定组collective在线重组执行组，系统实现基于vLLM-Omni。该架构针对异构请求造成的利用率和服务质量损失，但候选摘要在量化评测结果前被截断，因此目前无法判断收益幅度。

title.en: Orchestration Reward Modeling Reduces Multi-Agent Training Tokens
title.zh: 编排奖励模型降低多智能体训练token开销

papers.authors: K. Y. Tsang, Z. Zhao, V. Venkataramani, et al.

summary.en: OrchRM trains an orchestration-level reward model from intermediate multi-agent artifacts, avoiding repeated costly sub-agent rollouts for supervision. The authors report up to a 10x reduction in training-token use and accuracy gains of up to 8% for multi-agent test-time scaling across reasoning and web tasks. The hardware relevance comes from reducing generated and processed tokens, but the claims are preprint results and do not include energy or accelerator-level measurements.
summary.zh: OrchRM利用多智能体执行过程中的中间产物训练编排层奖励模型，避免为监督反复进行高成本子智能体rollout。作者报告训练token用量最多降低10倍，多智能体测试时扩展在推理和Web任务上的准确率最高提升8%。其硬件意义在于减少生成和处理的token，但这些仍是预印本结果，尚无能耗或加速器层面的测量。

title.en: EDA & Verification
title.zh: EDA与验证

title.en: A Single Program Specifies Both Hardware Drivers and Monitors
title.zh: 用同一程序同时定义硬件驱动器与监视器

papers.authors: E. Ng, N. Shyamsunder, F. Pham, et al.

summary.en: The proposed DSL expresses a hardware communication protocol once and derives both stimulus-driving behavior and transaction monitoring from the same imperative program. Given a waveform, the associated tool infers a transaction-level trace consistent with that specification, which could eliminate mismatches between separately maintained drivers and monitors. The paper is still a design proposal with planned evaluation on Wishbone and AXI-Stream, so real-world coverage, ambiguity handling, and runtime cost remain open.
summary.zh: 该DSL只需用一个命令式程序描述硬件通信协议，即可同时导出激励驱动行为和事务监视逻辑。配套工具能够根据波形推断与规范一致的事务级轨迹，有望消除驱动器与监视器分开维护造成的不一致。论文目前仍是设计提案，计划在Wishbone和AXI-Stream上评估，因此真实协议覆盖、歧义处理和运行成本仍待验证。
